just sees bytes." style="shape=callout;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="616" width="380" height="170" blocks.<br/>The ZK prover checks the salary predicate.<br/><br/>→ See Detail 4 for the browser ZK proof." TRUE</tt><br/><br/>This boolean is what gets proven." style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9ffe9;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="56" y="686" width="380" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4-zkbox" value="⚙️ ZK Prover (Groth16 / PLONK)<br/><b>WebAssembly — runs in browser tab</b><br/><br/>Inputs: extracted value
